# WZ-CONTRACT-GENERATED-001 — Generated code and documentation policy

Source: `docs/80-winzard/platform-contracts/WZ-CONTRACT-GENERATED-001.md`
Hash: `sha256:47938875e69ebfe9e03800f230ed122e647e753386b26e0a87c85c93cdd462db`

## Contract

- Generated outputs declare their generator and source contract version.
- Manual edits to generated outputs are drift and are rejected by checks.
- Fixes belong in canonical source documents or generators.
- Generated outputs must be deterministic for the same source set and generator version.

## Acceptance criteria

- `forge docs:adapters --check`, `forge context:check` and `forge docs:sync --check` detect drift.
